title: Young coach targets Eden League title
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - As the long-awaited...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - As the long-awaited Safa Eden Regional League finally kicked off this past weekend, one of the competition's young coaching talents is back in the dugout where many feel he belongs.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - As the long-awaited Safa Eden Regional League finally kicked off this past weekend, one of the competition's young coaching talents is back in the dugout where many feel he belongs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sinovuyo \"Mannie\" Mannie, the 29-year-old tactician from KwaNokuthula in Plettenberg Bay, has returned to George-based side Simunye FC as head coach and has made his intentions crystal clear."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The mandate is simple: win the Regional League title. Nothing less,\" Mannie told the Knysna-Plett Herald this week, his voice carrying the calm confidence of someone who has lifted the trophy before.","html":"\"The mandate is simple: win the Regional League title. Nothing less,\" Mannie told the Knysna-Plett Herald this week, his voice carrying the calm confidence of someone who has lifted the trophy before."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two seasons ago, Mannie delivered the regional league crown to Bitou Young Pirates in his hometown. Now he wants to prove he can do it again, this time as an \"outsider\" in George.","html":"Two seasons ago, Mannie delivered the regional league crown to Bitou Young Pirates in his hometown. Now he wants to prove he can do it again, this time as an \"outsider\" in George."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I've won in Plettenberg Bay, but conquering in George will be another achievement. Winning trophies with different teams motivates me."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It shows I'm not just a local coach who wins only at home,\" he said. Mannie's rise in local football has been swift but far from accidental. It started at Manchester United FC in KwaNokuthula, where the club handed a teenaged Mannie the junior side and simply said: lead.","html":"It shows I'm not just a local coach who wins only at home,\" he said. Mannie's rise in local football has been swift but far from accidental. It started at Manchester United FC in KwaNokuthula, where the club handed a teenaged Mannie the junior side and simply said: lead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That early trust turned a passionate youngster into one of the region's most respected young coaches. After successful spells elsewhere, including the title-winning campaign with Bitou Young Pirates, the pull of unfinished business brought him back to Simunye FC, a club he first coached before leaving for fresh challenges.","html":"That early trust turned a passionate youngster into one of the region's most respected young coaches. After successful spells elsewhere, including the title-winning campaign with Bitou Young Pirates, the pull of unfinished business brought him back to Simunye FC, a club he first coached before leaving for fresh challenges."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"There is still a chapter I need to complete in George. I came back because there's a story I want to finish with this team,\" he explained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Talent alone won't cut itSimunye has assembled one of the strongest squads in the league this season, packed with players who can light up any pitch in the Eden region. Mannie, however, is quick to temper excitement with reality.","html":"Talent alone won't cut it
Simunye has assembled one of the strongest squads in the league this season, packed with players who can light up any pitch in the Eden region. Mannie, however, is quick to temper excitement with reality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It's a team with a lot of talented players, but talent alone is not enough. Hard work will be a must.\"","html":"\"It's a team with a lot of talented players, but talent alone is not enough. Hard work will be a must.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His formula for success sounds almost old-school in an era of fancy tactics and analytics: unity, effort and discipline.","html":"His formula for success sounds almost old-school in an era of fancy tactics and analytics: unity, effort and discipline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Young coach targets Eden League title
